tipRules.tip: KVD: 'Before I ever got there, I had a Thunder Cricket on my mind.' Pre-spawn at 55° water with shallow grass — perfect for a bladed jig. Fish the outside edge of the grass, get it down, nice and slow. When you find one they're grouped — pre-spawn fish have buddies.

knowledge.insight: KVD: During pre-spawn, when you find one fish on a spot, they're usually grouped. Got a bite every single cast on one little spot on a point. They stage together before moving up to spawn. Mark the spot and work it thoroughly.

KVD: Clear water on grass lakes = fish can see the bait from farther away (benefit) but can also be spooky (challenge). Fish may be timid — bites are subtle, just bumping the bait. Slow down and keep working the area.
